# Limitations and future work {#sec-limitations}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — an outline of intended content and its source artifacts, not finished prose.
:::

*[Scaffold]* An honest register of what constrains these conclusions and what comes next.

## Limitations {#sec-limitations-list}

*[Scaffold]*

- **Sample size (n ≈ 54)** — winner's curse / magnitude inflation; lead with intervals (@sec-bridge-small-sample).
- **Latent general ability** is only partially repaired by the random intercept — internal DAG edges are imported from theory, not testable here.
- **Mediation is not identified** — triangulation only.
- **Provisional $\delta$** — the minimally-important differences are owned by the education lead and may change.
- **DiD shares the untreated cell** with the ITT — triangulation, not independent replication.
- **Measurement** — floors/ceilings; speech-gated expressive-vocabulary measurement.

## Future work {#sec-limitations-future}

*[Scaffold]* The deferred DAG decisions (domain-factor measurement model; phonetic-spelling direction; speech ⇄ vocabulary); reporting-plumbing debts; the planned plain-language publication. *Source:* the DAG note's open-decisions register.
